zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Thomas Wielher II於1139年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I26歲，母親Sisanna Hannah24歲。他於1166年與Elizabeth Toriey在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1185年在他的家鄉享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Thomas Wielher II于1139年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I26岁，母亲Sisanna Hannah24岁。他于1166年与Elizabeth Toriey在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1185年在他的家乡享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wielher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Trud.
perhaps a topographic name from Middle High German wuol, wüele ‘waterhole’ + -er.
habitational name for someone from a place called Wiehl or Wielen (see   Wiehl   and   Wiele  ).

variants.name: Wiehl
meanings: topographic name from Middle High German wuol(lache) ‘wallowing place’.
habitational name from any of the places called Wiehl, Wihl, or Wil in Germany and Switzerland.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Thomas Wielher II was born in 1139, in England, his father, Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I, was 26 and his mother, Sisanna Hannah, was 24. He married Elizabeth Toriey in 1166, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1185, in his hometown, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Thomas Wielher II est né en 1139, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sisanna Hannah, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Toriey en 1166, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1185, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Thomas Wielher II 1139 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I 26 und seine Mutter Sisanna Hannah 24. Er hat 1166 in England Elizabeth Toriey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1185 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Thomas Wielher II è nato il nel 1139 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Sisanna Hannah, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Toriey nel 1166, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1185, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Thomas Wielher IIが1139年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Thomas Wielher Iは26歳，母Sisanna Hannahは24歳であった。1166年にイギリスでElizabeth Torieyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1185年に故郷で46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Thomas Wielher II(이)가 1139년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sisanna Hannah(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1166년 영국에서 Elizabeth Toriey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1185년 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Thomas Wielher II nasceu em 1139, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sisanna Hannah, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Toriey em 1166, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1185, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Thomas Wielher II родился в 1139 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sisanna Hannah, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Toriey в 1166 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1185 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Thomas Wielher II nació en 1139, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Sisanna Hannah, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Toriey en 1166, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1185, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años.
